instruction: Help me record the project progress into the digest file

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Project Status Update
Project: Customer Data Platform (CDP) Development
Current Progress: 55% (planned 60%, slightly behind)
Completed: Requirements analysis, data architecture design, core module development
In Progress: Data integration layer development (70% done)
Pending: Frontend UI development, system testing, production deployment
Risk: Insufficient dev resources, recommend adding 2 engineers
Expected Completion: June 30, 2025 (original May 31, delayed by 1 month)' > /home/user/Desktop/project_status.txt

phases.instruction: Help me record the project progress into the digest file

Extract the project progress and completion date from /home/user/Desktop/project_status.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/project_digest.txt: 'CDP Project Progress: 55%, expected completion June 30, 2025 (delayed by 1 month)', save
